rulings.Case Title: CITIBANK NA VS. VICTOR R. KUBARA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for October 21, 2011, line 2. Plaintiff Citibank, NA as trustee for the Certificate Holders of Structured Asset Mortgage Investments, II, Inc., Asset Mortgage In Asset Mortgage Investments, and Mortgage Certificate Pass-through Series 2007-3 Motion for Summary Judgment is granted, subject to opposition. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEIDI L. CLEVER et al VS. CRAIG WEST et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for October 21, 2011, line 1. Defendants Craig West & Robert Head's Motion for Summary Judgment and Judgment on the Pleadings is denied. Failed to Shift Burden. (501/REQ)
